title: Store Settings
subtitle: Visibility and contact information settings
shopOpenDesc: Shop is open and visible to customers
shopClosedDesc: Shop is closed and will not appear to customers
publicPageDisabledDesc: Public page and map are disabled (dashboard still works)
publicPageEnabledDesc: Public page and map are working normally
deliveryDisabledDesc: Delivery is disabled - new orders won't reach couriers
deliveryEnabledDesc: Delivery is enabled - orders will reach couriers normally
contactDesc: Update contact information shown to customers.
addressDesc: Information shown on the shop page.
shopLocationOnMapDesc: Click on the map or drag the marker to set the location.
publicPageDisabled: Public page and map have been disabled
publicPageEnabled: Public page and map have been enabled
updatePublicPageFailed: Failed to update public page status: {{msg}}
updatePublicPageFailedShort: Failed to update public page status
deliveryDisabled: Delivery disabled - orders won't reach couriers
deliveryEnabled: Delivery enabled - orders will reach couriers
geolocationFailed: Failed to determine your location. Make sure location access is allowed.
